name: mnemo-cortex-mcp-bridge
description: Drop-in MCP bridge for any MCP-capable host. Generic shared bridge used by every Mnemo Cortex integration (Claude Desktop, Claude Code, OpenClaw, LM Studio, AnythingLLM, Agent Zero, Hermes Agent, Ollama, and more). Persistent semantic memory + Passport, plus optional brain-lane and wiki tools that auto-enable when those dirs exist.
author: Project Sparks
